name: 4q21_q22_segmental_duplications
description: 4q21-q22 interstitial SD cluster harbouring HERC3/HERC5/HERC6 (HECT/RLD E3 ligase paralogs), PYURF and ABCG2-flanking duplicons. NAHR between these SDs underlies the rare 4q21 microdeletion syndrome (Bonnet 2010) and recurrent 4q22 deletions reported in intellectual disability cohorts.

architecture.internal_structure: Two flanking SD blocks (~100-300 kb) at 95-97% identity containing HERC paralogs; unique core contains PRKG2, RASGEF1B, SEC31A; 4q22 sub-block contains FAM13A and ABCG2.
